disclaimer: Uncalibrated screening from published evidence only. Absence of evidence is reported as absence, never guessed.

models.name: Claude Opus 4.6
models.notes: Anthropic flagship at year-start; 128K max output doubled from Opus 4.5

models.name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
models.notes: Became Claude Code default; superseded by Sonnet 5 on 2026-06-30

models.name: GLM-5
models.notes: First frontier open-weight model from a publicly-traded Chinese AI company

models.name: Qwen3.5 (Qwen3.5-397B-A17B)
models.notes: First native-multimodal open-weights Qwen; 201 languages

models.name: Gemini 3.1 Pro
models.notes: Led 13/16 benchmarks at launch; still labeled preview on trackers

models.name: Grok 4.20
models.notes: Native 4-agent inference; largest context window (2M) at launch

models.name: Mistral Small 4
models.notes: Unifies Magistral, Pixtral, Devstral into one Apache 2.0 model

models.name: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super 120B-A12B
models.notes: Hybrid Mamba-Transformer; full training recipe and data released

models.name: GPT-5.4
models.notes: Native Computer Use API; 75% OSWorld beats human baseline

models.name: Qwen3.6-Plus
models.license: unverified (open siblings only; license not confirmed)
models.notes: Plus itself is API-only; open weights only via 35B/27B siblings

models.name: DeepSeek V4 (Pro + Flash)
models.notes: Tied Gemini 3.1 Pro on SWE-bench; strongest open-weights coding at release

models.name: Meta Muse Spark
models.notes: No public API as of 2026-07-06; consumer surfaces only; not routable

models.name: Kimi K2.6
models.notes: Agent Swarm scales to 300 sub-agents; 13-hour continuous coding runs

models.name: GPT-5.5
models.notes: Full retrain; omnimodal claimed but API exposes text+image only

models.name: Claude Opus 4.8
models.notes: Best computer-use model at launch (84% Online-Mind2Web)

models.name: Qwen3.7-Max
models.notes: Text-only; extreme output verbosity inflates effective cost per AA

models.name: Gemini 3.5 Flash
models.notes: Agent-focused I/O flagship; no computer use; Jan 2025 knowledge cutoff

models.name: Cohere Command A+
models.notes: Runs on 2x H100 at W4A4; 48 languages; sovereign-AI focus

models.name: MiniMax M3
models.notes: Some benchmark claims disputed; custom non-OSI license

models.name: Claude Fable 5
models.notes: Suspended Jun 12-30 under export controls; restored Jul 1

models.name: GLM-5.2
models.notes: Beat GPT-5.5 on select coding benchmarks at ~1/6 the cost

models.name: Claude Sonnet 5
models.notes: Default for Claude Free/Pro; updated tokenizer raises real token counts

models.name: GPT-5.6 Sol (+ Terra, Luna)
models.notes: ~20 orgs only under US government review; specs undisclosed

models.name: Microsoft MAI-Thinking-1
models.params: ~1T MoE (35B active; 962B total per tech report)
models.notes: Private preview only; no public API or pricing as of 2026-07-07
